name: Venison Pepper Steaks
recipeIngredient: 6 1/4 inch thick slices of venison loin (backstrap) or more, depending upon the appetite of those you are serving
Several cloves of garlic, peeled and cut in half
3 tablespoons whole black pepper corns, coarsely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Score the steaks all over with a sharp knife.
2. Rub each steak on both sides with a cut garlic clove.
3. Press cracked black peppercorns into one side of each steak.
4. In a large cast iron skillet (use 2 skillets for faster cooking), melt the butter and olive oil. Use as much or as little of the butter and oil mixture as needed.
5. When the oil and butter are hot, add the steaks. Fry on each side for about 3 minutes total.
6. Serve with remaining cooking butter poured over the steaks.
